title: Bunsik Korean Restaurant Website Frontend Rebuild

requirements.summary: Replace all Luna's Kitchen branding with Bunsik Korean Restaurant theme using warm red (#C0392B), black, and cream color palette with Korean street food styling
acceptanceCriteria: No Luna's Kitchen branding, text, or color variables remain anywhere in the frontend
Tailwind config reflects Bunsik's red/black/cream brand palette
Google Fonts import uses fonts appropriate for the Korean street food premium casual style
index.html title and meta tags reference Bunsik Korean Restaurant and Griffith NSW
All pages and components are fully responsive and look great on mobile screens

file_operations.description: Update meta title to 'Bunsik Korean Restaurant | Authentic Korean Street Food in Griffith NSW', update meta description to promote Korean fried chicken, tteokbokki, and bulgogi in Griffith, and update keywords to 'Korean restaurant Griffith, Korean fried chicken, tteokbokki, bibimbap, bulgogi, Griffith NSW'.

Replace Google Fonts imports with legible sans-serif fonts suitable for casual-premium Korean restaurant (e.g., Inter, Poppins). Update all CSS custom properties to use Bunsik's warm red (#C0392B tones), black (#000000, #1a1a1a), and cream (#F5F5DC, #FAF0E6) color palette. Remove all Luna's Kitchen chili/salsa color references. Ensure mobile-first responsive styles.

Replace Luna's Kitchen color palette (chili, salsa) with Bunsik brand colors: primary red (#C0392B and variants), black (#000000, #1a1a1a), and cream (#F5F5DC, #FAF0E6). Update fontFamily to use the new sans-serif fonts. Maintain container settings, dark mode, and plugin integrations for responsive design.

requirements.summary: Create full-screen Hero section with Bunsik headline, subheadline, three CTA buttons, and Korean food background images
acceptanceCriteria: Hero section is full viewport height
Headline, subheadline, and three buttons are visible on both mobile and desktop
All three buttons trigger smooth scroll to their respective sections
Background displays the fried chicken and tteokbokki hero image with a semi-transparent dark overlay

file_operations.description: Replace Luna's Kitchen hero content with Bunsik branding. Set headline to 'Authentic Korean Street Food in Griffith', subheadline to 'Fresh • Flavorful • Made with Love'. Replace existing CTA buttons with three new buttons: 'View Menu' (smooth scroll to #menu), 'Order Online' (smooth scroll to #order), and 'Book a Table' (smooth scroll to #reservation). Update background to use the generated hero image at frontend/public/assets/generated/hero-bg.dim_1920x1080.png showing Korean fried chicken and tteokbokki with dark overlay. Ensure full viewport height and mobile responsiveness.

requirements.summary: Create About Us section with Bunsik restaurant story, Griffin Plaza address, and phone number
acceptanceCriteria: About Us section displays the full story paragraph
Address and Griffin Plaza reference are shown
Phone number is displayed and tappable as a tel: link on mobile

file_operations.description: Replace Luna's Kitchen content with Bunsik story: 'Bunsik Korean Restaurant brings the taste of authentic Korean street food and traditional meals to Griffith. From crispy Korean fried chicken to sizzling bulgogi and comforting stews, we serve bold flavors in a casual, family-friendly atmosphere.' Display address 'Shop 1/2 Yambil St, Griffith NSW 2680 – Located in Griffin Plaza' and phone '+61 2 6964 7310' as a tel: link. Replace existing food image with a Korean dish image. Maintain two-column responsive layout.

requirements.summary: Create Opening Hours section displaying Bunsik's full weekly schedule with current day highlighted
acceptanceCriteria: All seven days and their hours are shown
The current day of the week is highlighted
Section is clearly readable on mobile

file_operations.description: Create a new Opening Hours component displaying the weekly schedule: Sunday 11am–8pm; Monday–Thursday 11am–3pm, 5pm–9pm; Friday 11am–3pm, 5pm–9pm; Saturday 11am–9pm. Use JavaScript Date.getDay() to detect the current day and apply visual highlighting (e.g., bold text, accent color background). Render each day in a card or list item with mobile-friendly styling using Bunsik's brand colors.

requirements.summary: Create Menu section with four categories displaying all Bunsik menu items and prices exactly as specified
acceptanceCriteria: All four categories are clearly labeled
Every item and its price is shown exactly as specified
Categories can be navigated via tabs or scroll sections
Menu section is easily readable on mobile

file_operations.description: Replace Luna's Kitchen menu with Bunsik's four categories: Korean Street Food (Rose Tteokbokki $12.50, Tteokbokki $11.00, Kimchi Pancake $28.60, Seafood Pancake $31.20, Gimbap $12.35, Fried Dumplings 5pcs $16.50); Korean Fried Chicken (Original $18.50, Sweet Soy $19.50, Hot & Spicy $19.50, Snow Cheese $19.50, Sweet & Spicy $19.50); Signature Meals (Bibimbap $27.30, Sizzling Beef Bulgogi $29.90, Kimchi Stew $29.90, Galbi-Tang $33.90, Cheese Spicy Chicken $33.90, Chicken Katsu $29.90); CUPBAP Bowls (Hot & Spicy Chicken CUPBAP $17.55, Sweet Soy Chicken CUPBAP $17.55, Beef Bulgogi CUPBAP $18.20, Spicy Pork CUPBAP $18.20). Implement tabs or scroll sections for category navigation. Use generated menu images: frontend/public/assets/generated/tteokbokki.dim_600x400.png, frontend/public/assets/generated/fried-chicken.dim_600x400.png, and frontend/public/assets/generated/bibimbap.dim_600x400.png for featured items. Ensure mobile-responsive grid layout.

requirements.summary: Create Online Ordering section with prominent pickup and delivery buttons
acceptanceCriteria: Two distinct buttons for pickup and delivery are visible in their own section
Buttons are large and tappable on mobile
Section has a clear heading and supporting copy

file_operations.description: Create a new Online Ordering section with heading 'Order Online' and descriptive text inviting customers to order. Render two prominent CTA buttons: 'Order Pickup' linking to '#order-pickup' and 'Order Delivery' linking to '#order-delivery'. Style buttons with Bunsik's brand colors, ensure large touch targets for mobile, and center the section content.

requirements.summary: Create Table Reservation form that collects booking details and stores them in the backend
acceptanceCriteria: Form includes all five fields with appropriate input types
All fields are required and validated before submission
Reservation data is persisted in the Motoko backend
A success message is displayed after successful submission
Form is fully usable on mobile

file_operations.description: Create a reservation form component with five required fields: Name (text input), Phone (tel input), Date (date picker), Time (time picker), and Number of Guests (number input). Implement form validation ensuring all fields are filled. On submission, call the backend storeReservation method from backend.d.ts with the collected data (name: string, phone: string, date: string, time: string, guestCount: bigint). Display a success confirmation message after the backend call succeeds. Handle errors gracefully. Use shadcn-ui form components and ensure mobile-friendly input controls.

requirements.summary: Create Reviews section displaying 4.7-star rating and customer testimonials carousel
acceptanceCriteria: 4.7 star rating is displayed prominently with star icons
At least three testimonial cards are shown
Carousel or horizontal scroll works on mobile
Testimonials include reviewer name and review text

file_operations.description: Replace Luna's Kitchen reviews with Bunsik Korean restaurant testimonials. Display '4.7 ★ out of 5' rating prominently at the top. Replace the three existing review cards with Korean restaurant-themed testimonials (e.g., praising Korean fried chicken, bulgogi, tteokbokki, authentic flavors, family atmosphere). Each card should include reviewer name, review text, and star rating. Maintain or enhance the carousel/horizontal scroll functionality for mobile. Use Bunsik's brand styling.

requirements.summary: Create Location & Contact section with address, phone, Google Map, and amenity badges
acceptanceCriteria: Google Map iframe is embedded and shows the correct address
Address and phone number are displayed and phone is a tappable tel: link
Three amenity badges (parking, accessibility, payments) are visible
Section is responsive on mobile

file_operations.description: Replace Luna's Kitchen location details with Bunsik information. Display address 'Shop 1/2 Yambil St, Griffith NSW 2680', phone '+61 2 6964 7310' as a tel: link. Embed a Google Maps iframe pointing to Griffin Plaza, Griffith NSW. Add three amenity info badges: 'Free Parking Lot', 'Wheelchair Accessible', and 'Accepts Credit/Debit/NFC Payments' using icons and text. Maintain the card-based layout and ensure mobile responsiveness.

requirements.summary: Update Header navigation and Footer with Bunsik branding, smooth-scroll links, and business information
acceptanceCriteria: Header is fixed at the top and includes nav links to all sections
Mobile hamburger menu opens and closes correctly
Footer includes address, phone, and abbreviated hours
Both header and footer use the Bunsik brand color palette

file_operations.description: Replace Luna's Kitchen branding with Bunsik logo/name. Update navigation links to smooth-scroll to sections: Menu (#menu), Order (#order), Reservations (#reservation), About (#about), and Contact (#contact). Update the call CTA button to use Bunsik's phone number '+61 2 6964 7310'. Ensure the mobile hamburger menu works correctly with the new links. Apply Bunsik's warm red, black, and cream brand colors to the header styling. Reference the generated logo at frontend/public/assets/generated/logo.dim_400x200.png.

Replace Luna's Kitchen footer content with Bunsik information. Display business name 'Bunsik Korean Restaurant', address 'Shop 1/2 Yambil St, Griffith NSW 2680', phone '+61 2 6964 7310' as a tel: link, and abbreviated opening hours summary (e.g., 'Mon-Fri: 11am-9pm, Sat: 11am-9pm, Sun: 11am-8pm'). Update copyright to Bunsik. Apply Bunsik's brand color palette. Maintain social media link structure if applicable, or remove if not needed.

requirements.summary: Wire all new sections and components into the Homepage layout and App routing
acceptanceCriteria: All new sections are rendered in the correct order on the homepage
Smooth scrolling works from header navigation to all sections
No orphaned components remain unreferenced
Page renders correctly on both mobile and desktop

file_operations.description: Replace the existing section composition with Bunsik sections in this order: Hero, AboutUs, OpeningHours, Menu, OnlineOrdering, ReservationForm, Reviews, Location. Remove CallToAction and Experience components if they no longer fit the Bunsik design. Ensure each section has an appropriate id attribute matching the header navigation targets (e.g., id='menu', id='order', id='reservation', id='about', id='contact'). Maintain responsive layout and spacing.

Verify that App.tsx still correctly renders Header, Homepage, and Footer. No routing changes needed since the site remains a single-page application. Ensure the component imports reflect the updated Bunsik components.
